title: Protocol for Recombinant Protein Expression in Escherichia coli (BL21) with Variable Antibiotics
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5w6hd","text":"This protocol aims to achieve high-level expression of recombinant proteins in Escherichia coli (BL21) using IPTG induction and optimized growth conditions, with the option to use either Kanamycin or Ampicillin for selection.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"aivmd","text":"Handle all reagents and biological materials according to safety guidelines. Wear appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) including gloves and lab coat. Dispose of all waste according to institutional regulations.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"yc0zn","text":"Materials - ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"nyo45","text":"E. coli BL21 1 vial","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ace3z","text":"Luria-Bertani (LB) medium 1 L liquid, 1 plate","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kozdk","text":"Antibiotic As required","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2ybd4","text":"IPTG 1 M stock solution, 5 µL per culture","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ty8as","text":"Glycerol 300 µL per culture","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dftlo","text":"SDS Sample Buffer 100 µL per sample","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"deldh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ufnjj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"yj82k","text":"Reagents - ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bkcbn","text":"Pfu DNA polymerase","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"w7ir5","text":"dNTP solution","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Thaw E. coli BL21 competent cells on ice.
Add 1 µg of plasmid DNA to 50 µL of competent cells.
Immediately place on ice for 2 minutes.
Add 950 µL of LB medium and incubate at 37°C for 1 hour with shaking.
Plate 100 µL of transformed cells on LB agar plates containing either 20 µg/mL Kanamycin or 50 µg/mL Ampicillin.
Inoculate a single colony into 5 mL of LB medium with the selected antibiotic (Kanamycin or Ampicillin).
Grow at 37°C with shaking until OD600 reaches 0.4 (approximately 2-3 hours).
Induce protein expression by adding 5 µL of 1 M IPTG (final concentration 1 mM).
Transfer 1 mL of culture to a microcentrifuge tube.
Discard supernatant and resuspend pellet in 100 µL of 1X SDS sample buffer.
Load 10 µL of the sample onto an SDS-PAGE gel.
Run the gel according to standard protocols.
creator: Tao-Ho Chang
